mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_MST ( EMAIL, HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, PASS_WD, MBR_NM, MBR_TEL , USER_ID , JOB_NM , PER_USE_CD, PER_USE_RED, PER_USE_YN , PER_INFO_CD, PER_INFO_RED, PER_INFO_YN, PER_PRO_CD, PER_PRO_RED, PER_PRO_YN , HOSP_UUID , JOIN_DT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP
) VALUES ( #{email}, #{hosp_cd}, #{hosp_nm}, #{pass_wd}, #{mbr_nm}, #{mbr_tel} , #{user_id}, #{job_nm} , #{per_use_cd}, #{per_use_red}, #{per_use_yn} , #{per_info_cd}, #{per_info_red}, #{per_info_yn}, #{per_pro_cd}, #{per_pro_red}, #{per_pro_yn}, #{hosp_uuid}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), NOW(), IFNULL(#{reg_user}, ''), IFNULL(#{reg_ip}, ''), NOW(), IFNULL(#{upd_user}, ''), IFNULL(#{upd_ip}, '') )
mapper.select:
SELECT EMAIL, HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, PASS_WD, MBR_NM, MBR_TEL , USER_ID , JOB_NM , IFNULL(USE_YN,'') USE_YN , PER_USE_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_USE_CD) PER_USE_NM , PER_USE_RED, PER_USE_YN , PER_INFO_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_INFO_CD) PER_INFO_NM , PER_INFO_RED, PER_INFO_YN, PER_PRO_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_PRO_CD) PER_PRO_NM , PER_PRO_RED, PER_PRO_YN , DATE_FORMAT(JOIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') JOIN_DT , REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP FROM TBL_MEMBER_MST WHERE 1=1
AND (HOSP_CD LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') OR HOSP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{hosp_cd},'%') )
Order by UPD_DTTM desc , HOSP_NM

SELECT B.HOSP_UUID , B.EMAIL, B.HOSP_CD, B.HOSP_NM, B.PASS_WD , B.MBR_NM , B.MBR_TEL , SUBSTRING(B.A1,17,20) SUB_NM, SUBSTRING(B.A1,1,8) START_DT , SUBSTRING(B.A1,9,8) END_DT , SUBSTRING(B.A2,17,20) SUB_NM1, SUBSTRING(B.A2,1,8) START_DT1 , SUBSTRING(B.A2,9,8) END_DT1
FROM ( SELECT A.HOSP_UUID , A.EMAIL, A.HOSP_CD, A.HOSP_NM, A.PASS_WD , A.MBR_NM , A.MBR_TEL , (SELECT CONCAT(IFNULL(T.START_DT, ''), IFNULL(T.END_DT, '') , IFNULL((SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'CONACT_GB' AND SUB_CODE = T.CONACT_GB), '') ) A1 FROM TBL_HOSPCONT_MST T WHERE T.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND T.CONACT_GB = '1' ORDER BY T.START_DT DESC LIMIT 1) AS A1, (SELECT CONCAT( IFNULL(T.START_DT, ''), IFNULL(T.END_DT, '') , IFNULL((SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'CONACT_GB' AND SUB_CODE = T.CONACT_GB), '') ) A2 FROM TBL_HOSPCONT_MST T WHERE T.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND T.CONACT_GB = '2' ORDER BY T.START_DT DESC LIMIT 1) AS A2 FROM ( SELECT B.HOSP_CD , B.HOSP_UUID, A.MBR_NM, A.MBR_TEL, A.PASS_WD, A.JOIN_DT, A.HOSP_NM, A.EMAIL , A.JOB_NM FROM TBL_MEMBER_MST A INNER JOIN TBL_HOSP_MST B ON A.HOSP_CD = B.HOSP_CD WHERE A.HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd} ) A ) B
WHERE (B.MBR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{mbr_nm},'%') OR B.MBR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{mbr_nm},'%') )
Order by B.HOSP_CD , B.HOSP_NM

SELECT EMAIL, HOSP_CD, HOSP_NM, PASS_WD, MBR_NM, MBR_TEL , USER_ID , IFNULL(USE_YN,'') USE_YN , JOB_NM , PER_USE_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_USE_CD) PER_USE_NM , PER_USE_RED, PER_USE_YN , PER_INFO_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_INFO_CD) PER_INFO_NM , PER_INFO_RED, PER_INFO_YN, PER_PRO_CD, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = PER_PRO_CD) PER_PRO_NM , PER_PRO_RED, PER_PRO_YN , JOIN_DT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP FROM TBL_MEMBER_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER_MST SET USER_ID = #{user_id} , USE_YN = #{use_yn} WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT A.HOSP_UUID, A.CONACT_GB, DATE_FORMAT(A.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , A.HOSP_CD, B.SUB_CODE_NM , A.CON_CONTENT, A.CON_USER_ID, A.CON_USER_TEL, A.CON_EMAIL, A.OCS_COMPANY, A.OCS_USER_ID, A.OCS_USER_PW, DATE_FORMAT(A.JOIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') JOIN_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.ACCEPT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'),'') ACCEPT_DT , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(A.CLOSE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d'),'') CLOSE_DT , A.USE_YN, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_USER, A.REG_IP FROM TBL_HOSPCONT_MST A INNER JOIN TBL_CODE_DTL B ON B.CODE_CD = 'CONACT_GB' AND B.SUB_CODE = A.CONACT_GB Where 1=1 AND A.HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid2} ORDER BY START_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HOSPCONT_MST ( HOSP_UUID, CONACT_GB, START_DT, END_DT, HOSP_CD, CON_CONTENT, CON_USER_ID, CON_USER_TEL, CON_EMAIL, OCS_COMPANY, OCS_USER_ID, OCS_USER_PW, JOIN_DT, ACCEPT_DT, CLOSE_DT, USE_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_uuid2}, #{conact_gb}, REPLACE(#{start_dt2},'-','') , REPLACE(#{end_dt2},'-','') , #{hosp_cd2}, #{con_content}, #{con_user_id}, #{con_user_tel}, #{con_email}, #{ocs_company}, #{ocs_user_id}, #{ocs_user_pw}, REPLACE(#{join_dt2},'-','') , REPLACE(#{accept_dt2},'-','') , REPLACE(#{close_dt2},'-',''), #{use_yn}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_HOSPCONT_MST SET HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}, CON_CONTENT = #{con_content}, CON_USER_ID = #{con_user_id}, CON_USER_TEL = #{con_user_tel}, CON_EMAIL = #{con_email}, OCS_COMPANY = #{ocs_company}, OCS_USER_ID = #{ocs_user_id}, OCS_USER_PW = #{ocs_user_pw}, JOIN_DT = REPLACE(#{join_dt2},'-','') , ACCEPT_DT = REPLACE(#{accept_dt2},'-',''), CLOSE_DT = REPLACE(#{close_dt2},'-',''), USE_YN = #{use_yn}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid2} AND START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt2},'-','') AND END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt2},'-','') AND CONACT_GB = #{conact_gb}
mapper.select: SELECT HOSP_CD , HOSP_UUID , DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , CONACT_GB , CON_CONTENT , CON_USER_ID , CON_USER_TEL , CON_EMAIL , OCS_COMPANY , OCS_USER_ID , OCS_USER_PW , DATE_FORMAT(JOIN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') JOIN_DT , DATE_FORMAT(ACCEPT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') ACCEPT_DT , DATE_FORMAT(CLOSE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') CLOSE_DT , USE_YN , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP FROM TBL_HOSPCONT_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid2} AND START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt2},'-','') AND END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt2},'-','') AND CONACT_GB = #{conact_gb}
SELECT 'Y' FROM TBL_HOSPCONT_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND START_DT <= REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','') AND END_DT >= REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','') LIMIT 1

SELECT A.HOSP_UUID, A.DIET_GB, CASE WHEN A.DIET_GB <> '' THEN (SELECT RTRIM(SUB_CODE_NM) SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_GB = 'Z' AND CODE_CD = 'GASAN_SIK' AND SUB_CODE = A.DIET_GB) ELSE '' END SUB_CODE_NM , B.USER_NM , C.HOSP_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , A.HOSP_CD, IFNULL(A.USE_YN,'') USE_YN , A.BIGO, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_USER, A.REG_IP, A.UPD_DTTM, A.UPD_USER, A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_DIET_MST A , TBL_USER_MST B , TBL_HOSP_MST C WHERE B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.USER_ID = A.UPD_USER AND C.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DIET_MST ( HOSP_UUID, DIET_GB, START_DT, END_DT, HOSP_CD, USE_YN , BIGO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_uuid}, #{diet_gb}, REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','') , #{hosp_cd}, #{use_yn} , #{bigo}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_DIET_MST SET HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}, BIGO = #{bigo}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND DIET_GB = #{diet_gb} AND START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','') AND END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','')
mapper.select: SELECT HOSP_CD , DIET_GB , START_DT, END_DT, HOSP_UUID, DIET_GB , BIGO , USE_YN , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP FROM TBL_DIET_MST WHERE HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND DIET_GB = #{diet_gb} AND START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','') AND END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','')
